comments.text: On the prime tuples conjecture, it is known that these normalized prime gaps have an exponential distribution, so that $f(c) = 1-e^{-c}$. If the densities exist, it seems straightforward to use upper bound sieves to get some Lipschitz type continuity on $f$; but without a significant advance towards the prime tuples conjecture it seems unlikely that current methods can show existence of the densities.
